title: Grok Spicy Mode: Ethereal Android Portrait
promptText: Generate a hyper-realistic digital portrait of a ethereal female android in a futuristic cyberpunk style, with flawless silver-chrome metallic skin covering her face and body, subtle golden highlights on her lips and eyelids, and faint tear streaks running down her cheeks for an emotional, melancholic expression. Her blonde hair is styled in a loose top bun with stray wisps framing her face. She wears an intricate, form-fitting suit of polished chrome armor with organic, flowing designs: a high, ruffled collar that curves upward like abstract flames or waves, segmented arm sleeves with coiled ridges, and a sculpted bodice emphasizing her figure with rounded, reflective breastplates. Behind her, expansive wing-like structures extend symmetrically, made of layered, undulating metallic sheets in shades of silver and blue, blending into a soft, glowing background gradient from light blue to white.
